scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome lint apps/client packages && cd apps/cli && python3.11 -m ruff check src tests
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome format --write apps/client packages && cd apps/cli && python3.11 -m ruff format src tests
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @concentray/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @concentray/client-data typecheck && pnpm --filter @concentray/client typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @concentray/client test && pnpm --filter @concentray/client-data test && cd apps/cli && python3.11 -m pytest -q
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
